item.title: FCC restores net neutrality, fulfilling yet another Biden promise.
item.description:
The Federal Communications Commission voted 3-2 along party lines on Thursday to restore net neutrality. The move fulfills a promise made by President Joe Biden in 2021 and effectively restores regulations put in place during the Obama administration. “In our post-pandemic world, we know that broadband is a necessity, not a luxury,” FCC Chairwoman Jessica Rosenworcel wrote. Net neutrality is the idea that internet service providers (ISPs) must give the same level of access to all data and websites. However, service providers are against net neutrality because they want the ability to charge for a higher tier of access or provide more bandwidth to sources they own. Without net neutrality, they were also allowed to block access to sites or to slow their data rates.
Under Traitor tRump, net neutrality rules were rapidly dismantled, with MAGAt Boot Licker FCC Chairman Ajit Pai celebrating the destruction. Pai was previously an attorney at Verizon and called concern over how ISPs would treat consumers’ “hysteria.” Pai resigned when Biden took office, but the damage he did remained until this week. https://www.dailykos.com/stories/2024/4/26/2237462/-FCC-restores-net-neutrality-fulfilling-a-Biden-promise
item.dc:creator: doxydad1

item.title: The Void Dumps Back - Episode 21
item.description:
(Edit because there's so much discourse about this one specifically: I think it does a good job at starting the conversation about how to better deal with long commute times.) Greetings! Happy Friday, to all who celebrate! I hope the unpleasant obligations go quickly, and you can get back to what you need.
Just gotta say that I'd love to be able to lay down and read. When you have glasses... You kinda can't.
Remind me to never do this.
This might help!
I am guilty of this.
Yep.
I mean. It's cute.
Bah-dum-tsss!
Ok, so this movie is a guilty pleasure of mine. Blair Witch 2: Book of Shadows. It's not a good movie haha. But I like watching it.
Mrglrglrglrgl!
Would be hilarious to hear.
It's true!
Get in the robot, Shinji!
... Yeah, I'll go for this.
:D
Basically, yeah.
This is cool.
Gotta keep the sand nailed down, we can't have sand fog everywhere.
Awwwww little pepper!!!
Some people really need practice!
Sigh.
This would be awesome.
I hope today is a gentle day for everyone. If it is not, I hope there are gentler times ahead. Also, reminder, you can click on an image and click the comment bubble to see what number an image is, and it even creates the link for you in the comment! #memes #memedump #meemays #funny #void
item.dc:creator: DaBaDoop

item.title: If you cultivate a mushroom in a petri bowl on agar agar, its actual ′′ shape ′′ becomes visible. The essential part of a mushroom, the Mycel, is usually hidden from our eye. What we perceive as a ′′ mushroom ′′ is only its transient fruit body.
item.description: "In my photo a piece of clean, living, flesh (the circle in the centre) has been taken directly from a young mushroom, placed onto nutrient rich agar, in order to expand its mycelium so it can be put into multiple new substrates, fully colonising and then eventually giving rise to (hopefully!) hundreds more fruit bodies . This plate has been left too long and the mycelial mat has matured, the linear rhizomorphic growth giving rise to hyphal knots (the tiny star like white dots) giving way to primordia (the tiny babies at the top left) who very very quickly (within a day or 2 depending on the species) turn into a full fruit body, who, within another few days will mature enough to release its own spores." Source: peggyfarmandforage on Instangram https://www.instagram.com/p/CMwXAitrcns/ #nature #mildlyinteresting #mushroom #agardish #fungi #science
item.dc:creator: TongueTiedLabourerfromtheLandoftheLittlePeople

item.title: Something something blasphemy
item.description:
If you are, you're going to be upset... I would move along. Clearing out my phone of a few memes
In my post yesterday the big argument was that religion is the cause of morality. (https://imgur.com/gallery/uJtQf87) Apparently it was how religion you can't be empathetic they say.
My former step brother has stage 4 brain cancer. According to the former stepmother it's part of God's will. What a horrible way to justify somebody's suffering.
How many school shootings in the past few years?
Putting the fear of imaginary consequences into the youth is abhorrent
Delusions for me but not for the
Not to mention the sheer amount of hallucinogens that were taken in the time period
This would make a good bumper sticker
Story of Jesus abridged
And there was a party for him anyway so what did he lose
This is a fun one to ask Christians.
Talking to oneself is not mentally sound.
Really wish the majority of Christians would realize that they're the ones persecuting, judging, attacking others. And it's not the other way around. People are allowed to have an opinion. Just as people are allowed to follow their religion here in the United States. However, separation of church and state has been forgotten by those religious few. Anyway, I wanted to clear these out of my phone. Hope to hear what y'all have to say in the comments below
item.dc:creator: AnSquirrel

item.title: It's Meme Dump Day... again vol. 104
item.description:
Hello again friends. My phone is still yelling at me for being out of space. I need to transfer all my fantus videos off there I guess lol but until then I am dumping some of the thousands of memes I have saved.
hahahaha fuck.
I fuckin love grackles.
Yes please and thank you but I hope it's quality worldbuilding.
.
I'll see y'all there.
everything is gross. As a lifelong germaphobe I've just had to come to terms with that.
wtf cropping....sorry.
I unabashedly love comment sections. I look at all the replies.
Hahaha are we gonna make it to middle age?
It's @CodyBurkett
WOW these memes are old but still.
Yep.
.
Someone convince me not to make afternoon coffee.
boo
I aspire to someday write a book of poems half as good as Mary Oliver.
@fuegobpyre
Chronic pain life be like...
.
Every day its the goddamn kitchen.
hahaha @deafkitten
.
I see this in my future when my son goes to school this year.
I grew up with a mom with real bad undiagnosed ADHD and she hoards and my family's house was always a disaster and it was so embarrassing so now, though I too am an undiagnosed adhd whirlwind human, my house has to be fucking clean every time people come over so I drive myself nuts cleaning it then I still apologize for it being messy. Super fun.
.
.
No no, come back, that was pretty good.
Me during NaPoWriMo after the first week.
worth it.
.
.
Whelp
They are all puppies forever.
.
Me, every day.
You could put it that way. If inarticulate sounds count as guitar noises..?
.
Adore this. I think it's simple to find the beautiful things in people and focus on those, and beautiful souls shine through so clearly.
.
Thanks, void.
stoppp
The best.
There are a lot of days it has caterpillars or plants in it though.
.
.
.
I love spring, but fall forever.
FANTUS TAX. I posted a whooole pupdate of him earlier, if you'd like to see more puppy.
Hobbes tax :) Happy friday, friends.

My Autism hole is gone now :(
Just to day, the stream has a piss meter
This is the worst aged words since "Peace in our time".
If you call yourself an Alpha or a Sigma, you're neither.
For Chats: http://discord.abbii.gay For Shitposts: http://tumblr.abbii.gay For srs and maybe shitposts: http://mastodon.abbii.gay For jokes about Clint's sheep fetish: http://twitch.abbii.gay

item.title: A brand new world
item.description:
Hi everyone, I'm MrPuckett You might notice a new city behind my blind and deaf dog Nanna
We've lived in Nashville, Tennessee for the last 4 years but my family is up in Minnesota My mom's been struggling with cancer and my father takes care of her
Then my father was diagnosed with alzheimers. So I packed up my little family and we moved 900 miles north to be closer to my parents
I don't even drive. Two amazing Imgurian friends in Indiana drove all the way to Nashville, rented a sprinter van, helped me load it all up and drove me and my 3 dogs to Minneapolis
It was tough leaving a city where I put down so many roots, I'd never been so involved with nonprofits in my life Starting over from scratch is never easy.
Moving with 3 dogs who are rarely ever in a car, and one of them blind and deaf, that was pretty tough as well. We all even stayed overnight at the Imgurian's home in Indiana so the dogs could get a travel break
While PJ and MrsPuckett are adjusted and loving all the new places we can run, it hasn't been so easy with my 18 year old dog
Learning a new home and yard at her age and with her special needs is no easy task I love our new apartment but Nanna kept getting 'stuck' in places and completely shutting down
She was so nervous every time we went outside, seemingly unable to understand why her entire world was now different.
We've now been in the Twin Cities for 25 days and everything has gotten a little easier We found a nearby grocer, started to learn all the safe running routes and best of all -
Nanna is starting to get a lot more comfortable in her new home and city!
I was out of commission for TheFreePizzaDude for a number of weeks trying to make this move happen I can't thank everyone in that project enough for keeping it going, it was really nice just to concentrate on the move and nothing else.
I'm excited to be back and if anyone needs food or wants to send someone food, I'll be posting as @TheFreePizzaDude tomorrow at 1pm central Even if you don't need food or can't help, everyone upvoting the post early helps us reach so many more people.
So now that the dogs are all set, my apartment is put together and I finally feel safe and comfortable here I'm excited to go back and help some of the rehabs, halfway houses and food banks that kept me alive during my end stage addiction
And to show this 18 year old blind dog as much fun as possible with the time she has left. You're doing an amazing job Nanna Pants, Minneapolis is going to love you so much. ... If you can't make TheFreePizzaDude post tomorrow but would still like to help, you can always contribute to the meal fund and we'll send the food to someone in need for you! https://www.paypal.me/TheFreePizzaDude https://ko-fi.com/thefreepizzadude ... Hope everyone has a beautiful weekend, we'll see you again soon
item.dc:creator: MrPuckett
